show.title: Backups
show.description: Add backups to your database to save the data to a different provider.
show.noProviderBefore: To create a backup you need at least one provider. Go to
show.composeAlertBody: Make sure the compose is running before creating a backup.
show.deleteBackupDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?

validation.databaseTypeRequiredCompose: Database type is required for compose backups
validation.serviceNameRequiredCompose: Service name is required for compose backups
validation.postgresUserRequired: Database user is required for PostgreSQL
validation.mariadbUserRequired: Database user is required for MariaDB
validation.mariadbPasswordRequired: Database password is required for MariaDB
validation.mongoUserRequired: Database user is required for MongoDB
validation.mongoPasswordRequired: Database password is required for MongoDB
validation.mysqlRootPasswordRequired: Root password is required for MySQL

handle.tooltipFetch: Fetch: clones the repository and loads services.
handle.tooltipCache: Cache: if you deployed this compose before, services are read from the last deployment or fetch.
handle.prefixDescription: Use to store backups under a specific path in your destination or bucket.
handle.keepLatestPlaceholder: Keeps all backups if left empty
handle.keepLatestDescription: Optional. If set, only the latest N backups are kept in the cloud.

restore.title: Restore backup
restore.description: Select a destination and search for backup files.
restore.searchSelectBackupPlaceholder: Search and select a backup file
restore.tooltipFetch: Fetch: clones the repository and loads services.
restore.tooltipCache: Cache: if you deployed this compose before, services are read from the last deployment or fetch.
